summary: C4: server db.ts + apply.ts — polymorphic prepared stmts (insertReviewActionEdge, selectStagedEdge, generic deleteEdge/upsertEdge, updateStagedEdgeStatus/Type) + apply transaction dispatch on target_table

Generic upsertEdge/deleteEdge replace EXPRESSES-hardcoded versions; staged_tags branch refactored to pass type explicitly.
